title: What's the lowest CV you have achieved?
content:
My current lowest CV is ~6.5, but it does NOT translate at all to LB. infact, some of my worst performing CV at ~7.6 scored 6 at LB.

This mismatch is anxiety inducing because I don't know which one to go with.

comments.content: 5.4 single model, 5.0 equal weight ensemble. Trust your CV.

replies.content:
Already pretty close to the theoretical limit.

I have a few more tricks up my sleeve.
